text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exactly what kind of race are fans imagining when
we talk about a "dream race"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Are we thinking of races where the strongest
runners gather and wager everything they have?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or are we thinking of races where fated rivals
step up for a rematch, giving life to their hopes
and apprehensions?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Races both practical and implausible—each and
every single one has the potential to be
someone's dream race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's important is that there are an equal
number of dream races as there are dreams
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if there's one thing that I can say with full
certainty...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's that Bamboo Memory's presence today makes
the Arima Kinen a dream race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
BAMBOO MEMORY, REPORTING TO RACE! I
hope you all enjoy the show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa-ho-HO! Now this's what I'm talkin' 'bout!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen wasn't enough, huh? Ya got a taste and had to come run in the Arima Kinen too? Screw distance aptitude, izzat it? Now that's style!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's here to duke it out, so there was no
way I was gonna miss it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That's what I like about you! Let's make
today a real festival for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I can't wait to see the skills of the racer
who defeated Oguri up close and personal!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Creek! I've been super, super excited to face you today! I've been dreaming about it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, you flatterer! ♪ Let's make this race count!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hello, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's make this race the best we've ever had.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah, one brimming with passion!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O! Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so pumped for today! I've never actually run in
a 2,500-meter race before, but I wanted to give
it a shot after watching you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you how strong pursuing my rival—and
my dream—has made me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll show you I'm one of your ultimate rivals too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yeah you are! But watch yourself, because
I'm here to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sole reason I stand here today is because you
turned history on its head and broke the chains
that bound our generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for
leading me here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In return, I'll show you exactly how bright I shine
today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And I shall do so as... one of your ultimate rivals.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll do the same for you... And I'll be so bright that
there's no outshining me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've told you this before, but allow me to repeat
myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You are a dear friend and a formidable opponent
for whom I have nothing but respect.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now is the time to fulfill the vow we swore.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall use every ember of the fierce blaze within
me to face you as your ultimate rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Same here, Yaeno. I'm going to use every ounce
of strength I have to be the formidable opponent
you've been looking for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's make this the ultimate race, Yaeno!
